notes: PENDING: a non-author operator must run docs/collaboration/MVP_OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md end-to-end on a clean checkout, then update this file (operator, verified=true, verified_at, evidence_run_id matching the OPERATOR_INTERACTION_DEMO.json that was generated during their run).
